caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with light-colored suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a large, grey, stylized wig. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a piece of clothing with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a similar logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with smaller text below it. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and mostly still, maintaining a neutral expression while looking slightly to his left, with very subtle movements in his posture and head position as the scene progresses.
